job_title: Jr. Executive / Executive – Sales Admin (Evening Shift)
job_description: Jr. Executive / Executive – Sales Admin (Evening Shift) : Akij Venture Ltd. Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Akij Venture Ltd. Jr. Executive / Executive – Sales Admin (Evening Shift) Application Deadline : 11 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Age: 26 to 35 years Location: Dhaka Salary: Negotiable Experience: At most 2 years Published: 02 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) Master of Business Administration (MBA) Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Finance, or a relevant discipline from any reputed university. Experience At most 2 years The applicants should have experience in the following business area(s): Agro based firms (incl. Agro Processing/Seed/GM), Beverage, Bicycle, Food (Packaged), Group of Companies, Healthcare/Lifestyle product, Insurance Freshers are also encouraged to apply. Additional Requirements Age 26 to 35 years Only Male Basic knowledge of MS Excel and Google Sheets. ERP/Oracle system knowledge will be an added advantage. Good typing speed and data entry accuracy. Strong communication and coordination skills. Willingness to work in evening shift (04:00 PM to 12:00 AM). Responsibilities & Context Place sales orders accurately in the Oracle/ERP system. Process daily orders and ensure timely follow-up. Prepare and maintain daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports. Update and track sales data in Google Sheets and Excel. Provide system and order-related support to Sales Representatives (SR) and Area Sales Managers (ASM). Follow up on pending orders, stock balance, and delivery status. Maintain proper documentation and sales records. Perform other administrative and operational tasks as assigned. Skills & Expertise Communication and interpersonal skill Microsoft Excel Oracle ORACLE EBS Teamwork Compensation & Other Benefits Provident fund,Gratuity,Insurance,Weekly 2 holidays,Mobile bill Salary Review: Yearly Festival Bonus: 2 As per the company policy Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply. Job Location Dhaka Job Highlights We are seeking a detail-oriented Executive / Jr. Executive – Sales Admin to manage order processing, system updates and reporting. The role requires close coordination with the Field Force to ensure smooth execution and timely delivery. Company Information Akij Venture Ltd. Experience in working with SHGs, or community-based organizations is strongly preferred. Knowledge on market systems and rural livelihoods in Bangladesh Good communication and report-writing skills in Bangla and English Understanding of Carers issues, disability inclusion, gender equality, and rights-based approaches Ability to work independently and lead, coordinate, and manage field team. Commitment to Carers leadership and inclusive development Effective communication, conflict management and problem-solving skills Excellent team management skills. Responsibilities & Context ***  Job Responsibilities: Implement the Carers Worldwide model, livelihood, including income-generating activities (IGAs), skills development training, and market linkage initiatives. Develop training modules in line with the project instructions. Select carers based on assessments and form training batches according to the project design. Conduct selection and assessment of carers for livelihood training in the trades mentioned in the project. Facilitate the opening of bank accounts for individual carers SHGs. Transfer grants project to Carers’ SHGs based on assessment results. Support carers in purchasing selected livelihood equipment or goods to start their livelihood activities. Prepare guidelines for carers on how to receive grants from their groups and how to repay the received grants to the carers’ groups. Provide technical support to selected carers for livelihood activities, along with follow-up support to enhance their livelihood capacities. Link carers with existing government safety net programs to ensure the sustainability of their livelihood activities. Maintain close collaboration with local government institutions, line departments, and service providers. Maintain accurate field records, beneficiary profiles, photographs, and case studies. Prepare progress reports as per project requirements and track progress against planned initiatives. Support carers in marketing their products. Ensure project implementation is aligned with existing carers’ project activities. Conduct awareness meeting on Carers Worldwide model and livelihood activities. Safeguarding Responsibilities: Adhere to CDD's

job_description: Sr. Manager/AGM, Product Development & QC (Akij Healthcare & Hygiene Ltd.) : Akij Venture Group Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Akij Venture Group Sr. Manager/AGM, Product Development & QC (Akij Healthcare & Hygiene Ltd.) Strong leadership, analytical, and problem-solving skills. Excellent knowledge of product formulation, materials, and regulatory standards. Ability to lead cross-functional teams and manage multiple innovation projects. Strong communication and documentation skills with strategic thinking ability. Responsibilities & Context Akij Healthcare & Hygiene Ltd. (AHHL) is looking for a dynamic, experienced, and innovative professional to lead its Product Development & Quality Control department. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing new products, maintaining the highest quality standards, ensuring regulatory compliance, and driving innovation to support the company’s strategic growth in the healthcare and hygiene sector. Responsibilities: Lead and oversee the complete lifecycle of product development from concept to market launch. Ensure all new and existing products align with company standards, consumer needs, and regulatory guidelines. Supervise product modification and formulation improvements to enhance performance, cost-effectiveness, and customer satisfaction. Maintain and monitor quality standards of raw materials, packaging, and finished goods as per approved specifications and SOPs. Validate analytical methods and production processes to ensure consistency and reliability. Ensure timely renewal and maintenance of all licenses, certificates, and regulatory approvals. Approve packaging designs and artworks to ensure compliance with branding and legal standards. Initiate and implement innovation projects for process optimization, cost reduction, and product enhancement. Collaborate with R&D, Production, and Marketing teams to ensure effective product commercialization. Prepare reports on product quality performance, innovation outcomes, and compliance status for management review. Skills & Expertise Product Development QC Compensation & Other Benefits Mobile bill,Provident fund,Gratuity Lunch Facilities: Partially Subsidize Salary Review: Yearly Festival Bonus: 2 Medical Insurance.
